sources: Walrus stores arbitrary data blobs off-chain, with metadata and storage proofs anchored on the Sui blockchain.
It uses erasure coding to split data into fragments distributed across a decentralized network of storage nodes for redundancy.
Storage payments and access control are managed via Sui smart contracts, with fees paid in SUI tokens.

sources: Walrus stores arbitrary data blobs off-chain, with metadata and storage proofs anchored on the Sui blockchain.
It uses erasure coding to split data into fragments distributed across a decentralized network of storage nodes for redundancy.
Storage payments and access control are managed via Sui smart contracts, with fees paid in SUI tokens.
state.report: Walrus provides decentralized storage by keeping arbitrary data blobs off-chain while anchoring metadata and storage proofs on the Sui blockchain. To ensure redundancy, it employs erasure coding to split data into fragments and distributes them across a decentralized network of storage nodes. Payments and access control are enforced through Sui smart contracts, with fees settled in SUI tokens.
